title: stelis cinerea
intro: Stelis cinerea, also known as the Grey Ant Orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis and is native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stelis cinerea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Stelis cinerea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
